title: Update TDMA guard time constants to spec default 100ms
description: Change GUARD_TIME_MS, LICHEN_TDMA_GUARD_MS from 50 to 100 in lichen/subsys/lichen/link/include/lichen/link.h to match TDMA beacon guard field default and slot duration formula in spec/02a-coordinated-capacity.md:92. Update all references in tdma_tx_allowed().
close_reason: Updated GUARD_TIME_MS and LICHEN_TDMA_GUARD_MS to 100 per spec; updated tdma_tx_allowed() to use constant; committed as 29fc41741
